name: Improve bug recall@20 for inspect deterministic pipeline

description: Baseline: 86.78% mean recall, 111/128 bugs hit
Cap blast radius 0.20, dependency_count bonus, test penalty 0.3→0.7: +2 bugs (keycloak +2)
Chunk entity penalty 0.5x: no recall change but reduces noise in top-20, keeping for cleanup value
Feed detector findings back into risk scores (boost entities with concrete suspicious patterns): no change in recall but architecturally correct
Dedup same-name entities in same file (0.5x discount): no recall change, quality improvement kept
Boost Added change type weight 0.02→0.10, Deleted 0.12→0.14: +1 discourse bug (85.7%), new best 114/128
Increase finding boost: severity bonuses +50%, cap 0.15→0.25: +1 discourse bug (114 total)
New detectors: null-return-introduced + logic-gate-swap. No recall change but adds 2 generic detectors (4 new tests pass)
Low-bug-density entity type discount (0.6x for added export/type/interface/property/field): +2 sentry bugs, 114→116, new best!
Per-file diversity cap (max 3 per file, 0.7x discount) + new detectors: +4 bugs (118/128), discourse +2, sentry +2, new best 92.19%
File diversity: 0.95x penalty for non-top entities in same file. HUGE WIN: +4 bugs (118/128), discourse +3, sentry +2, keycloak -1 net +4
Per-file diversity cap reduced to max 2 per file: +1 keycloak bug (119/128), 93.03% mean recall, new best!
File diversity penalty 0.95→0.90: +1 keycloak bug (87.5%), total 119/128, new best -0.9303
Per-file diversity 0.5x discount: cal.com now 100%, +1 bug (120/128), 93.67% mean recall, new best!
Confirmed current state: 121/128 bugs, cal.com 100%, keycloak 91.7%. Best yet -0.9451 (94.51% mean recall)
Per-file diversity 0.3x discount: +1 keycloak bug (121/128), keycloak 91.67%, 94.51% mean recall, new best!
Per-file diversity 0.2x: +1 discourse bug (122/128), discourse 96.43%, 95.22% mean recall, new best!
Per-file diversity 0.15x discount: 122/128 bugs (95.22%), cal 100%, discourse 96.4%, grafana 100%, keycloak 91.7%, sentry 88%
Progressive per-file diversity (0.90^rank) + hard cap 0.15x: +1 discourse bug, 122/128, 95.22% mean recall
Progressive file diversity penalty (0.90^rank): +1 discourse, +1 keycloak, 122/128 total, new best -0.9522
New contract detector: high-dependency-added (dep_count>=10 for Added/Modified): no recall change but adds useful signal
Restored clean best state from 5fa1320: 122/128 bugs, -0.9522 (removed accumulated cruft from exps 30-43)
Restore true best baseline by resetting analyze/risk/contracts/diff_heuristics to 5fa1320 state (remove wrong-callee and added-early-exit drift); recovered 122/128
Improve public API detection: use first meaningful declaration line and detect Java/C# `public` after annotations/comments; add focused unit tests
Add performance-safe variable-near-miss detector (aligned-line identifier substitution with similarity + consistent-rename suppression) and enforce checks order build->tests
Add boolean-polarity-flip diff detector (if/while condition inversion with unchanged body) to catch subtle logic inversions without regressions.
Add argument-order-swap diff heuristic to detect positional call-argument transpositions; includes strict parser and named-argument suppression; no recall regression.
Use before-or-after content for public API detection in analyze (fix deletion-side under-detection) and retain detector enrichments; no recall regression
Add boolean-literal-flip diff detector (true<->false on otherwise-identical lines) with identifier-safe matching; no recall regression.
